title: Memory Boom Drives Korean Stocks’ Breakthrough Past 6,000 Level
description: Just a month after surpassing the once-unthinkable 5,000 milestone, South Korea’s equity benchmark has crossed another threshold as a surge in global memory demand powers the country’s biggest chipmakers.
content: Just a month after surpassing the once-unthinkable 5,000 milestone, South Korea’s equity benchmark has crossed another threshold as a surge in global memory demand powers the country’s biggest chipmakers.
